response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/distributed-systems exposure, but the role demands 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale cloud compute infrastructure — neither of which is evidenced. C++ experience is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments a decade ago, and there is no demonstrated technical-leadership track record over cloud/DevOps engineers on a compute platform.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career across web, embedded, and distributed/low-latency systems (Dunnhumby millions of req/s)
Founder of GISCollective with Kubernetes deployment experience and open-source platform ownership
Active mentor/teacher: workshops, dojos, Selenium course, and conference talks
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only a brief NI C/C++ role; modern stack is TS/Node/DLang
No clear cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture leadership experience
No evidence of formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
